infrastructure_issues.description: build-scripts/apply-patches.js does not exist. Referenced in CLAUDE.md and decider prompt. Patches for sections.json must be applied manually until this script is created.

internal_issues.description: Current Gaia section (824 chars) strawmans the dome position. Dome claims 'firmament wobble' explains parallax, not just a 'local sun.' Expansion (5102 chars) fixes this and adds distance-dependence test.
GPS section (1526 chars) only gives single relativistic corrections argument. Dome's GPS Sagnac claim unaddressed. Expansion (6386 chars) adds altitude constraint and Keplerian orbit tests.

CRITICAL: Current Sec 4.5.9 claims 'd_geo is undefined.' This is FALSE. V13 explicitly defines d_geo: EW_arc = 4aE(e²)(Δlon/360)(r_avg/a), NS = |r₁ − r₂|, d_geo = √(NS² + EW_arc²). A dome defender can immediately refute point 1. Expansion (10769 chars) acknowledges the definition and redirects to the real flaws: curve-fitting to WGS84 and undefined n(r).
Current Solar section has self-contradictory 50%/30% numbers (ISS-418, ISS-419). Expansion provides rigorous calculation (52% at 90° hour angle) and adds photographic evidence section.

WIN-001 detail_extra: Current framing says 'two incompatible calculations' but doesn't show WHY this proves ad hoc fitting. New text adds explicit calculation: 11.78 × 0.74 = 8.72 Hz appears nowhere in the model.
